seo.title: CuraMain – Home Care & Participation in Frankfurt | Nordend · Bornheim · Ostend
seo.description: CuraMain: Professional home care in Frankfurt – Nordend, Bornheim & Ostend. Medical and personal care, culturally sensitive support. Fully insured. ☎ 069 79 216 147
seo.keywords: home care Frankfurt, outpatient nursing Frankfurt, ambulatory care Frankfurt, culturally sensitive care Frankfurt, multilingual nursing service, care Frankfurt Nordend, care Frankfurt Bornheim, CuraMain

hero.pill: Care & Participation in Frankfurt – at every stage of life
hero.h1: Because your home is the best place to heal.
hero.p: Professional, culturally sensitive care in Frankfurt – right at home in Nordend, Bornheim, and Ostend. Our multilingual team supports people of all ages with expertise, compassion, and a genuine understanding of each person's life situation.
hero.subline: Free & no obligation · Multilingual · Reply within 24 h
hero.badge1: Approved by all health insurers (§ 132a SGB V · § 72 SGB XI)

services.label: What we offer
services.h2: Care that sees the whole person.
services.p: From medical treatment care to household support – we provide all nursing services under one roof. Step by step, we are expanding to include care and participation services for children, young people, and adults with disabilities.

items.title: Medical Treatment Care
items.desc: Wound care, injections, medication administration – carried out by qualified nursing professionals on medical prescription.

items.title: Personal Care
items.desc: Personal hygiene, mobility assistance, nutrition support – provided with dignity and compassion.

items.title: Advisory Visits
items.desc: Mandatory consultations for care allowance recipients – free of charge and professionally delivered.

items.title: Household Support
items.desc: Shopping, cleaning, laundry, meals – we take the everyday burden off your shoulders.

culture.label: Culturally Sensitive
culture.p: Frankfurt is one of Germany's most diverse cities. At CuraMain, that diversity is reflected in our team – our multilingual staff respects religious, cultural, and gender-sensitive needs.

points.title: Multilingual Team
points.desc: Care in your language – our team communicates in multiple languages.

points.title: Religiously Sensitive
points.desc: Prayer times, Ramadan, halal/kosher dietary needs respected.

points.title: Gender Sensitive
points.desc: On request, exclusively female or male nursing professionals.

teilhabe.label: Coming Soon — Launch Q4 2027 / Q1 2028
teilhabe.h2: Care and Participation – across every stage of life.
teilhabe.p: Anchored in our articles of association and currently in development: CuraMain is expanding its services to include care and participation for children, young people, and adults with disabilities. If you would like to express interest now, we welcome advance registrations – we will be in touch as soon as the relevant care is available.
teilhabe.note: Phase 1 services (personal care, medical care, advisory visits) are already active.

items.title: Paediatric Home Nursing
items.desc: Home nursing care for chronically ill children and young people (SGB V § 132a).

items.title: Out-of-Hospital Intensive Care
items.desc: Care for ventilator-dependent patients at home, in nurseries, and at school (§ 37c SGB V, AKI-RL).

items.title: School Accompaniment
items.desc: Support for pupils with physical, cognitive, or emotional impairments throughout their school day (SGB IX / SGB VIII).

items.title: Social Participation Services
items.desc: Assistance and accompaniment for adults with disabilities in everyday life (SGB IX §§ 76 ff.).

coverage.label: Service Area
coverage.p: From Berger Straße 69, we cover the area around Nordend-Ost, Bornheim, and Ostend – with e-bike routes, short travel times, and reliable tour schedules.

areas.name: Ostend
areas.sub: ECB Quarter · Habsburgerallee · Red Cross Clinic

items.name: Fatima A.
items.text: My father barely speaks German – that was always a challenge for us. At CuraMain, we were immediately matched with an Arabic-speaking nursing professional. He finally feels understood and well cared for.

items.name: Dr. Markus R.
items.text: I have been referring patients to CuraMain for over a year. The feedback is consistently positive: punctual, well-documented, and always reachable. A reliable partner for my practice.

items.name: Renate H.
items.text: After my hip surgery, I wanted to get home as quickly as possible. CuraMain coordinated the discharge with the clinic and was there on day one. I would never have thought it could go so smoothly.

ctaBanner.p: The initial consultation is free, multilingual, and non-binding. We can also come to your home.

items.title: Social Participation Services

seo.title: About CuraMain – Care & Participation in Frankfurt with 13+ Years of Experience
seo.description: CuraMain Frankfurt: founded by experienced nursing professionals with over 13 years of hands-on practice in Nordend, Bornheim, and Ostend. Our values, team, and vision: care and participation across every stage of life.
seo.keywords: CuraMain about us, nursing service Frankfurt team, care and participation Frankfurt, outpatient care Frankfurt experience, culturally sensitive care Frankfurt founders

hero.pill: 13+ years of nursing experience · Frankfurt am Main
hero.p: CuraMain stands for care and participation in Frankfurt that genuinely works. Founded by nursing professionals with over 13 years of hands-on experience in Nordend, Bornheim, and Ostend – driven by true compassion and the commitment to provide dignified, professional care. Step by step, we are expanding our services to include participation support for children, young people, and adults with disabilities.

mission.p: To enable people of all ages – children, adults, seniors – to live a self-determined life in their familiar surroundings. With professional, culturally sensitive care and reliable participation support that sees the whole person.

vision.p: To be the most trusted address in the Rhine-Main region for care and participation across every stage of life – known for quality, compassion, cultural diversity, and the reliability of a locally rooted service.

items.title: Compassion
items.desc: Every person deserves care that respects their dignity and individuality.

items.title: Reliability
items.desc: Punctuality, commitment, and consistency are the cornerstones of our work.

items.title: Teamwork
items.desc: Only together can we ensure the best care for our patients.

items.title: Quality
items.desc: Continuous professional development and the highest standards in care are what we stand for.

items.text: Boys Bangura begins his nursing career in Frankfurt. Early placements in inpatient and outpatient care – the foundation for over a decade of hands-on nursing experience.
Taking on leadership responsibilities: tour planning, onboarding new nursing staff, and direct collaboration with GPs and clinics in Frankfurt's Ostend and Bornheim districts.
A growing conviction: Frankfurt needs a care service that sees cultural diversity not as a challenge but as a strength. The idea for CuraMain takes shape.
An intensive preparatory phase: concept development, building a network with hospitals and social services, selecting the Berger Straße 69 location – right in the heart of the service area.

CuraMain GmbH is formally incorporated in Frankfurt am Main. With over 13 years of nursing experience and a multilingual team, CuraMain launches in Nordend, Bornheim, and Ostend – under the brand "Care and Participation" across every stage of life.

Phased expansion to include school accompaniment, social participation services, paediatric home nursing, and out-of-hospital intensive care – anchored in the articles of association, with a clear quality and staffing roadmap.

cta.p: A personal conversation, a home visit, or a phone consultation – we make time for you.
